metadata.description: Log Analytics workspace name for Microsoft Sentinel

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# SOC Operations Overview
---
Real-time visibility into security operations, alert trends, and MITRE ATT&CK coverage."},"name":"header"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":14400000},{"durationMs":43200000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000}]}}]},"name":"parameters"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated >= {TimeRange:start}
| summarize Count=count() by AlertSeverity
| order by Count desc","size":1,"title":"Alerts by Severity","queryType":0,"visualization":"piechart"},"name":"alertsBySeverity","customWidth":"33"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated >= {TimeRange:start}
| summarize AlertCount=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc","size":0,"title":"Alert Trend","queryType":0,"visualization":"timechart"},"name":"alertTrend","customWidth":"67"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated >= {TimeRange:start}
| where AlertSeverity in ('High', 'Critical')
| summarize Count=count() by AlertName
| top 10 by Count
| order by Count desc","size":0,"title":"Top 10 Critical/High Alerts","queryType":0,"visualization":"barchart"},"name":"topAlerts","customWidth":"50"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated >= {TimeRange:start}
| extend Entities = parse_json(Entities)
| mv-expand Entities
| where Entities.Type == 'host'
| extend HostName = tostring(Entities.HostName)
| summarize AlertCount=count() by HostName
| top 10 by AlertCount desc","size":0,"title":"Top 10 Targeted Hosts","queryType":0,"visualization":"barchart"},"name":"topHosts","customWidth":"50"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated >= {TimeRange:start}
| extend Tactics = parse_json(ExtendedProperties).Tactics
| mv-expand Tactics
| summarize Count=count() by tostring(Tactics)
| where isnotempty(Tactics)
| order by Count desc","size":0,"title":"MITRE ATT&CK Tactic Coverage","queryType":0,"visualization":"barchart"},"name":"mitreTactics","customWidth":"50"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated >= {TimeRange:start}
| summarize
    TotalIncidents = count(),
    OpenIncidents = countif(Status == 'New' or Status == 'Active'),
    ClosedIncidents = countif(Status == 'Closed'),
    AvgClosureTimeHours = round(avg(iff(Status == 'Closed', datetime_diff('hour', ClosedTime, CreatedTime), long(null))), 1)
","size":4,"title":"Incident Summary","queryType":0,"visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true}},"name":"incidentSummary","customWidth":"50"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated >= {TimeRange:start}
| summarize Count=count() by ProviderName
| order by Count desc","size":0,"title":"Alerts by Source Product","queryType":0,"visualization":"piechart"},"name":"alertsBySource","customWidth":"50"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= {TimeRange:start}
| where ResultType != '0'
| summarize FailedLogins=count() by IPAddress
| top 10 by FailedLogins desc","size":0,"title":"Top 10 Failed Login Sources","queryType":0,"visualization":"table"},"name":"failedLogins","customWidth":"50"}],"isLocked":false}
